title: Apparatus and method for controlling delivery of broadcast content
abstract: A system and method for controlling delivery of broadcast content are described. They include a broadcast device configured to receive a first media stream from a first content source, provide the first media stream for broadcast transmission in a broadcast communication network while operating in a first operating mode. They further include a diagnostic device configured to monitor at least one characteristic of the quality of the first media stream from at least one location in the broadcast communication network, generate at least one control signal in response to a determination that a value for the at least one characteristic exceeds a threshold value, provide the at least one control signal over the broadcast communication network. The broadcast device is further configured to select a second operating mode in response to receiving at least one control signal, the second operating mode being different from the first operating mode.
claims:
Claims 1 . A system for controlling delivery of broadcast content, comprising: a broadcast device coupled to a broadcast communication network, the broadcast device configured to operate in a first operating mode, the first operating mode including receiving a first media stream from a first content source and providing the first media stream for broadcast transmission; at least one diagnostic device coupled to the broadcast communication network, the at least one diagnostic device configured to: receive the first media stream from at least one location in the broadcast communication network; monitor at least one characteristic of quality of the at least one media stream; generate at least one control signal in response to a determination that a value for the at least one characteristic exceeds a threshold value; and provide the at least one control signal to the broadcast gateway over the broadcast communication network; wherein the broadcast device is further configured to operate in a second operating mode in response to receiving the at least one control signal, the second operating mode being different from the first operating mode. 2. The system of claim 1 , wherein the broadcast device, in the second operating mode, is further configured to: replace the first media stream with a second media stream; and provide the second media stream for broadcast transmission. 3. The system of claim 2, wherein the diagnostic device is further configured to receive the second media stream from at least one location in the broadcast communication network. 4. The system of claim 2, wherein the second media stream is from a second content source. 5. The system of claim 2, wherein the second media stream is selected from at least one of a plurality of available media streams from a plurality of sources. 6. The system of claim 2, wherein the first media stream and the second media stream contain substantively similar content. 7. The system of claim 6, the first media stream and the second media stream are the same media stream received from a single source but selected at different points in the transmission path. 8. The system of claim 2, wherein at least one of the first media stream and the second media stream is received via one of a wireless connection and a wired connection. 9. The system of claim 1 , wherein the at least one diagnostic device is coupled to the broadcast communication network by at least one of a wireless connection and a wired connection. 10. The system of claim 1 , wherein the at least one characteristic of quality is selected by a user of the diagnostic device. 11. The system of claim 1 , wherein the at least one characteristic includes at least one of bit rate, modulation error rate, signal to noise ratio, bit error rate, bitrate bandwidth, missing content, content synchronization, and number of discarded packets. 12. The system of claim 1, wherein the threshold value is determined based on an operating range selected by a user for the at least one characteristic. 13. The system of claim 1 , wherein the broadcast device, in the second operating mode, is further configured to modify a transmission parameter associated with the first media stream prior to providing the first media stream for broadcast transmission. 14. The system of claim 13, wherein the at least one characteristic of quality is assigned a number if it is determined that it is outside of the user defined operating range and wherein the broadcast device is only configured to operate in the second operating mode if the sum of the numbers is greater than a threshold. 15. The system of claim 13, wherein the at least one diagnostic device further comprises: a first diagnostic device, located at a first geographic location, configured to monitor the at least one characteristic of the quality of the broadcast transmission containing the first media stream at the first geographic location and generate a first control signal in response to a determination that the at least one characteristic is outside of the user defined operating range; a second diagnostic device, located at a second geographic location configured to monitor the at least one characteristic of the quality of the broadcast transmission containing the first media stream at the 

second geographic location and generate a second control signal in response to a determination that the at least one characteristic is outside of the user defined operating range; and wherein the broadcast device, in response to receiving the first and second control signals, adjusts the at least one transmission parameter associated with the first media stream in the broadcast device. 16. The system of claim 15, wherein the adjusting of the at least one transmission parameter increases reception performance of a broadcast signal containing the first media stream when received by at least one broadcast signal receiver located within a geographic region covered by the broadcast transmission. 17. The system of claim 13, wherein the at least one transmission parameter includes at least one of low density parity check encoding rate, Bose, Ray-Chaudhuri and Hocquenghem encoding rate, interleaver depth, modulation depth, and fast fourier transform size. 18. The system of claim 1 , wherein the broadcast device includes at least one of a studio content processing system, broadcast gateway, and exciter, a transmitter, and a transmitter antenna. 19. A method for controlling delivery of broadcast content, comprising: receiving a first media stream from a first content source; providing the first media stream for broadcast transmission in a broadcast communication network while operating in a first operating mode; monitoring at least one characteristic of the quality of the first media stream from at least one location in the broadcast communication network; generating at least one control signal in response to a determination that a value for the at least one characteristic exceeds a threshold value; providing the at least one control signal over the broadcast communication network; and selecting a second operating mode in response to receiving the at least one control signal, the second operating mode being different from the first operating mode. 20. The method of claim 19, wherein the second operating mode includes replacing the first media stream with a second media stream and providing the second media stream for broadcast transmission.
